args:
set -eu
explain_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json > "$explain_json"
python3 - "$explain_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert sorted(obj.keys()) == ['backend_decision', 'diagnostics', 'optimization_explain', 'plan', 'rewrite_trace', 'soc_plan', 'verification', 'vllm_integration']
assert obj['plan']['structural_identity']['plan_identity']
assert obj['rewrite_trace']['passes']
assert obj['diagnostics']['diagnostics']
PY
printf 'explain-json-shape\n'
